chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-69 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A. 7800/2024 30.10.2024 Mr. Waheed Ahmed Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. ----- Urgency is granted. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner states that the Respondents are not taking any Decisions on the Application pending before them for demarcation. Learned AAG present in Court in other matters has stated that Petition can be disposed of and the Respondents will decide the Application in accordance with law, if any. Order accordingly. The Respondents should decide the Application within 2 weeks. This Petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
